title: Hearty Canadian Borlotti Stew
description: A comforting and flavorful stew made with borlotti beans, perfect for a cozy evening. This recipe combines the rich flavors of roasted vegetables with a hint of spice.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic and sauté until softened.
Add roasted vegetables and cook for 5 minutes.
Add borlotti beans, spicy tomato paste, and stew seasoning. Stir to combine.
Add 4 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes.
If using Canadian bacon, add it to the pot and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Optional: serve with crusty bread or over mashed potatoes.
